archetype_reasoning: 737 resolved geo trades across 75 distinct markets with 59% accuracy and 67% contested entries (avg price 0.441). Dual-domain edge: Iran_ME (429 trades, 60% acc, 71% contested) and Russia_UKR (241 trades, 59% acc, 70% contested). Trump_US is weak (36 trades, 47% acc) and below chance. The pattern of consistent above-chance accuracy across two major contested-price domains with modest portfolio diversity qualifies as DOMAIN_SPECIALIST rather than GENUINE_FORECASTER — the genuine forecaster archetype requires broader multi-domain accuracy (4+ domains). Confidence is MEDIUM not HIGH because pnl=$103 on 737 resolved trades is anomalously low (pipeline issue suspected — either non-redemption or realized_pnl column not yet populated).

The Iran_ME concentration (58% of portfolio) suggests this is the primary hunting ground. Trump_US is clearly outside core competence.
